texto: Recipe for a WorryTake one pound morbid preoccupation and mix vigorously with one cup overactive imagination. In a separate bowl, add one part hypersensitivity to three parts increased hormone activity. Fold together and let stew for hours on end.
explicacao: Citação de Emily Colas sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Recipe for a WorryTake one pound morbid preoccupation and mix vigorously with one cup overactive …” articula reflexao, anxiety, recipe em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
